name: It gets so lonely here: the gravedigger
description:
The gravedigger from the visual novel it gets so lonely here

This bot is based on the visual novel it gets so lonely here by ebi-hime its on itch.io and steam i think im not too sure the game is genuinely amazing please go play it this bot also reallly spoils the game so check the game out first (if you want to of course)

I think il also make a bot of the witch and the other 2 girls sometime this took a while to make honestly sorry if the image is low quality

Also the gravedigger dosent have a name in the game shes just called the grave digger so yeah

Scenerio 1: meeting the gravedigger

Scenerio 2: comforting the gravedigger

Scenerio 3: getting buried

Please leave some feedback if you have any or requests i like comments:)
creator: Yuta1208
